title: Festival Poster Studies
description: Five independent prestige-poster studies translating fandom-scale worlds into restrained competition, selection, and awards-season packaging.
creative_direction: This package broadens the topic beyond one cast. Each image is a standalone festival-poster treatment with its own fictional franchise premise, but every study must retain the sparse hierarchy, premium spacing, and restrained branding grammar of serious award-circuit key art.

en.title: Festival Poster Studies
en.description: Five independent prestige-poster studies translating fandom-scale worlds into restrained competition, selection, and awards-season packaging.

zh-CN.title: 影展海报单图研究
zh-CN.description: 五张独立的高级影展海报研究图，把粉丝向世界观翻译成克制、正式、可发行的竞赛片包装。
